verdict: PARTIAL — coef=+1.307, p=0.379 (above α=0.1); direction inconclusive
falsification_rule_text: SUPPORTED if β1 (mortgage liberalisation) is positive and significant at p<0.10 for both homeownership and residential investment. PARTIAL if positive and significant for homeownership but not investment (demand reallocation without supply response). REFUTED if β1 is negative and significant at p<0.10. INFORMATIVE: excluding USA and UK should not eliminate the positive sign; if it does, the result is driven by Anglo- Saxon cases.
